sample_outputs.text: The party agreed that it was unwise to locate the base in the Holy Loch, only 30 miles from Glasgow, a city with two million people. It should be asked in a more remote area. Mr. Gaitskell added that the Searborough conference decisions did not, in this view, truly reflect the opinions of the majority of party members and still less the party's supports in the country.

blocks.text: The party agreed that it was unwise to locate the base in the Holy Loch, only 30 miles from Glasgow, a city with two million people. It should be asked in a more remote area. Mr. Gaitskell added that the Searborough conference decisions did not, in this view, truly reflect the opinions of the majority of party members and still less the party's supports in the country.

Sir Francis is to hand over to Sir Richard as from Nov. 1. The hand-over, due in September, was delayed because of me.

Berlin crisis. Mr. Watkinson and his advisers felt the change would be unwise at a moment when we attention had to be curculling on possible need for important military operations. For this reason Sir Francis stayed on, and sales sacrificed his leave.

blocks.text:
Sir Francis is to hand over to Sir Richard as from Nov. 1. The hand-over, due in September, was delayed because of me.

Berlin crisis. Mr. Watkinson and his advisers felt the change would be unwise at a moment when we attention had to be curculling on possible need for important military operations. For this reason Sir Francis stayed on, and sales sacrificed his leave.

notes: PaddleOCR-VL-1.6 on cropped handwritten regions. Standalone benchmark (no harness imports).
